name: Piccalilli (Peagram)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the vegetables into bite-sized pieces.
2. Place them in a large bowl and sprinkle with salt. Let stand for 4 hours.
3. Drain the vegetables in a colander and discard the liquid.
4. In a large pot, bring the vinegar to a boil and add the vegetables. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 15 minutes.
5. Drain the vegetables and discard the vinegar.
6. To make the sauce:
a. Pour the vinegar into a pot.
b. Stir in the mustard seeds, ginger, garlic, peppercorn, turmeric, mustard, and sugar. Heat over low heat until the sugar has dissolved.
c. Increase the heat to medium and bring to a boil. Stir frequently.
d. Simmer for 15 minutes. Remove from heat and strain the liquid into a bowl. Discard the spices.
e. Return the liquid to the pot. Stir in the flour mixed with water. Place over medium heat.
f. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly. Simmer for 2 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and pour the sauce over the vegetables, mixing well. Bottle in warm, sterile jars and seal.
